## Offers & benefits

### 25% off on MD Hyderafacials

[The Hydrafacial delivers long-term skin health and can be tailored to meet the specific needs of all skin types. It offers instant, noticeable results with no downtime or irritation. The Hydrafacial treatment removes dead skin cells and extracts impurities while simultaneously bathing the new skin with cleansing, hydrating and moisturizing serums. \\
\\
More Info](https://www.fmsskin.com/hydrafacial-treatment-cost-price-in-hyderabad-india/)

### 20% Off on FMS Signature Angel Glow

[Glow treatments are done at dermatologist clinic with a minimum downtime. Multiple procedures help in enhancing the natural radiance and luminosity of skin. Whether you’re dealing with dull looking skin or uneven skin tone or tanned skin, these treatments are your go to treatments which address specific concerns. \\
\\
More Info](https://www.fmsskin.com/blog/discover-the-magic-of-glow-treatments-for-achieving-radiant-skin/)

### 30% Off on Rejuvenation Glow Drips

[Embark on a journey to unveil the radiant version of yourself with our exclusive Rejuvenation and Glow Drips. Tailored to replenish and revitalize, these drips are the secret behind that coveted luminosity and youthful glow. These IV drips typically contain a combination of vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, glutathione, hydration fluids etc... \\
\\

# Best Skin Clinic In Hyderabad, India – FMS Skin & Hair Clinics

FMS Skin & Hair Clinics takes immense pleasure in making one confident in their own skin and body. Our team will take you on a journey of healthy skin, hair and body alongside most advanced and updated tools. We are one of the most advanced cosmetic dermatology centres and rated as the best skin clinic in Hyderabad, India.  Our Clinics, located in the heart of the Hyderabad city, combines cutting-edge technology with a team of experienced Dermatologists, Aesthetic Dermatologists, Trichologists & Hair Transplant Specialists to provide personalized care tailored to each patient’s unique requirements.

FMS Skin is a state-of-the-art clinic dealing with cosmetic/aesthetic skin and hair procedures as well as general dermatological treatments. Our clinics are on par with international standards. Our Top-Notch Skin Specialists, **[Cosmetic Dermatologists](https://www.fmsskin.com/best-dermatologist-in-hyderabad/)** use the latest technologies, medical research and incorporate US-FDA approved equipment with cutting-edge technology in the field of Cosmetic dermatology, Expertized in providing Advanced Anti-Aging Treatments.

FMS Hair is Hyderabad’s [**Best Hair Transplant Clinic**](https://www.fmsskin.com/best-hair-transplant-clinic-in-hyderabad/) equipped with technology performed by expert Hair Transplant Specialists. Our team will guide you after a detailed hair analysis and towards streamlined Hair Treatments which include advanced Hair Transplants, new hair growth techniques like PRP Hair Treatment, GFC Hair Treatment, and other non-invasive treatments like Laser Hair Regrowth.

FMS Sculpt in addition provides [**body shaping & Contouring Treatments**](https://www.fmsskin.com/body-shaping-body-contouring-in-hyderabad/), facilitated with advanced equipment for body sculpting purposes exclusively handled by a team of expert Cosmetic Dermatologists, Aestheticians and Trained Therapists. Expertize in Inch loss & stubborn Fat reduction Treatments, advanced non-invasive body shaping & contouring Treatments.

## WHY FMS SKIN & HAIR CLINICS IS THE BEST SKIN CLINIC IN HYDERABAD?

Premium Skin Care by Expert Dermatologists in Hyderabad

**FMS Skin & Hair Clinics** is a trusted destination for **premium skin care** and advanced dermatology treatments in Hyderabad. Led by experienced board certified dermatologists, we offer personalized, result-driven skin and hair solutions using internationally approved technologies.

From medical dermatology to aesthetic and anti-aging treatments, every procedure at FMS follows global safety standards, ethical practices, and a patient-first approach—ensuring natural, long-lasting results you can trust.

FMS Skin & Hair Clinics – Trusted for Premium Skin Care

**Expert Dermatologists**

All treatments are performed by qualified, experienced dermatologists with a deep understanding of Indian skin types.

**Advanced Technology**

US FDA–approved lasers and advanced devices for safe, precise, and effective results.

**Personalized Treatment Plans**

No one-size-fits-all. Every treatment is customized based on skin type, concern, and goals.

**International Safety Standards**

Strict hygiene protocols, medical-grade products, and globally accepted treatment guidelines.

**Proven Results & Patient Trust**

Thousands of satisfied patients trust FMS for consistent, visible outcomes in skin and hair care.

Offers & benefits

25% off on MD Hyderafacials

The Hydrafacial delivers long-term skin health and can be tailored to meet the specific needs of all skin types. It offers instant, noticeable results with no downtime or irritation. The Hydrafacial treatment removes dead skin cells and extracts impurities while simultaneously bathing the new skin with cleansing, hydrating and moisturizing serums.
More Info

20% Off on FMS Signature Angel Glow

Glow treatments are done at dermatologist clinic with a minimum downtime. Multiple procedures help in enhancing the natural radiance and luminosity of skin. Whether you’re dealing with dull looking skin or uneven skin tone or tanned skin, these treatments are your go to treatments which address specific concerns.
More Info

These IV drips typically contain a combination of vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, glutathione, hydration fluids etc...

Best Skin Clinic In Hyderabad, India – FMS Skin & Hair Clinics

FMS Skin & Hair Clinics takes immense pleasure in making one confident in their own skin and body. Our team will take you on a journey of healthy skin, hair and body alongside most advanced and updated tools. We are one of the most advanced cosmetic dermatology centres and rated as the best skin clinic in Hyderabad, India.  Our Clinics, located in the heart of the Hyderabad city, combines cutting-edge technology with a team of experienced Dermatologists, Aesthetic Dermatologists, Trichologists & Hair Transplant Specialists to provide personalized care tailored to each patient’s unique requirements.

FMS Skin is a state-of-the-art clinic dealing with cosmetic/aesthetic skin and hair procedures as well as general dermatological treatments. Our clinics are on par with international standards. Our Top-Notch Skin Specialists, Cosmetic Dermatologists use the latest technologies, medical research and incorporate US-FDA approved equipment with cutting-edge technology in the field of Cosmetic dermatology, Expertized in providing Advanced Anti-Aging Treatments.

FMS Hair is Hyderabad’s Best Hair Transplant Clinic equipped with technology performed by expert Hair Transplant Specialists. Our team will guide you after a detailed hair analysis and towards streamlined Hair Treatments which include advanced Hair Transplants, new hair growth techniques like PRP Hair Treatment, GFC Hair Treatment, and other non-invasive treatments like Laser Hair Regrowth.

FMS Sculpt in addition provides body shaping & Contouring Treatments, facilitated with advanced equipment for body sculpting purposes exclusively handled by a team of expert Cosmetic Dermatologists, Aestheticians and Trained Therapists. Expertize in Inch loss & stubborn Fat reduction Treatments, advanced non-invasive body shaping & contouring Treatments.

WHY FMS SKIN & HAIR CLINICS IS THE BEST SKIN CLINIC IN HYDERABAD?

Premium Skin Care by Expert Dermatologists in Hyderabad

FMS Skin & Hair Clinics is a trusted destination for premium skin care and advanced dermatology treatments in Hyderabad. Led by experienced board certified dermatologists, we offer personalized, result-driven skin and hair solutions using internationally approved technologies.

From medical dermatology to aesthetic and anti-aging treatments, every procedure at FMS follows global safety standards, ethical practices, and a patient-first approach—ensuring natural, long-lasting results you can trust.

FMS Skin & Hair Clinics – Trusted for Premium Skin Care

Expert Dermatologists
All treatments are performed by qualified, experienced dermatologists with a deep understanding of Indian skin types.

Advanced Technology
US FDA–approved lasers and advanced devices for safe, precise, and effective results.

Personalized Treatment Plans
No one-size-fits-all. Every treatment is customized based on skin type, concern, and goals.

International Safety Standards
Strict hygiene protocols, medical-grade products, and globally accepted treatment guidelines.

Proven Results & Patient Trust
Thousands of satisfied patients trust FMS for consistent, visible outcomes in skin and hair care.

FMS has invested heavily in state-of-the-art technology and equipment, being the Best Skin Clinic in Hyderabad with top Dermatologists in India. This assures the best possible outcome in cosmetic skin and hair treatments.
